heading: Rental payments in advance in case of withdrawal of lands for war or national defense purposes
label: 315r Rental payments in advance in case of withdrawal of lands for war or national defense purposes
text: In administering the provisions of , payments of rentals may be made in advance.section 315q of this title
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as a part of act , known as the Taylor Grazing Act, which comprises this subchapter.June 28, 1934
